ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the contract */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the buyer (department or agency) initiating the contract */,
  "expression_start" TEXT /* Date when expressions of interest start */,
  "expression_end" TEXT /* Date when expressions of interest end */,
  "estimated_value" TEXT /* Estimated value of the contract */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Current status of the contract */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the procurement category */,
  "actual_value" TEXT /* Actual value of the contract after award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date when the contract was awarded */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected end date of the contract */,
  "contract_documents" TEXT /* Reference to the contract documents */,
  "contract_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract manager responsible for the contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES procurement_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer agency or department */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to procurement */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the buyer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the buyer was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the buyer's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of goods or services provided by the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the supplier was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the supplier's information */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bids" (
  "bid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bid */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract for which the bid is submitted */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier submitting the bid */,
  "bid_amount" TEXT /* Amount proposed in the bid */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date when the bid was submitted */,
  "bid_status" TEXT /* Status of the bid */,
  "evaluation_score" TEXT /* Score given to the bid during evaluation */,
  "bid_documents" TEXT /* Reference to the bid documents */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the bid was submitted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update date of the bid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bids_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "procurement_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the procurement category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the procurement category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical structure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_procurement_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES procurement_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract related to the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the audit log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES contracts ("contract_id")
)
